name: Simple Prayer
text: If played before a Gift this round, that Gift gains +1 Fervor.

name: Simple Prayer
text: If played before a Gift this round, that Gift gains +1 Fervor.

name: Attention
text: Look at the top card of your deck. You may discard it.

name: Attention
text: Look at the top card of your deck. You may discard it.

name: Service
text: In cooperative play, the companion may contribute one additional card this round.

name: Service
text: In cooperative play, the companion may contribute one additional card this round.

name: Resistance
text: Cancel -1 Light caused by World, Devil, or Flesh.

name: Resistance
text: Cancel -1 Light caused by World, Devil, or Flesh.

name: Brief Examen
text: If you fail this Trial, treat it as a Failure with Examen.

name: Fragility
text: Clutters your hand. It may be removed by purification effects.

name: Pride
text: Shortcut: +5 Light this round, but +1 Attachment. Humility may purify this card.

name: Greed
text: Shortcut: gain +1 Fruit, but +1 Attachment. Generosity may purify this card.

name: Lust
text: Shortcut: draw 2 cards, but +1 Attachment. Chastity may purify this card.

name: Wrath
text: Shortcut: +4 Light, but +1 Desolation. Patience may purify this card.

name: Gluttony
text: Shortcut: heal 1 Desolation now, but +1 Attachment. Temperance may purify this card.

name: Envy
text: Shortcut: draw 1 card and gain +3 Light, but add Envy to your discard. Charity may purify this card.

name: Sloth
text: Shortcut: avoid effort, but +1 Desolation. Diligence may purify this card.

name: Humility
text: Against Pride, add +4 Light manually and you may purify one Pride.

name: Generosity
text: Against Greed, add +4 Light manually. You may spend 1 Fruit to gain +1 Communion if you succeed.

name: Chastity
text: Against Lust, add +4 Light manually. Cancel one Lust or Flesh temptation.

name: Patience
text: Against Wrath, add +4 Light manually. Ignore one reactive penalty.

name: Temperance
text: Against Gluttony, add +4 Light manually. Fasting and Abstinence gain +1 Light this round.

name: Charity
text: Against Envy, add +4 Light manually. In cooperative play, the companion gains +1 Consolation.

name: Diligence
text: Against Sloth, add +4 Light manually. You may play one additional card this round.

name: Wisdom
text: If you did not accept a shortcut this round, you may manually double this card's extra Fervor.

name: Understanding
text: Reveal or cancel confusion. Gain +1 Fervor.

name: Counsel
text: Change the main sin of the Trial. Gain +1 Fervor.

name: Fortitude
text: Ignore one penalty from Flesh or Desolation. Gain +1 Fervor.

name: Knowledge
text: Look at the next 3 cards of your deck. Gain +1 Fervor.

name: Piety
text: Heal 1 Desolation. Gain +1 Fervor.

name: Fear of the Lord
text: Reject a revealed temptation. If it was strong, gain +1 Consolation and +1 Fervor manually.

name: Baptism
text: Permanently remove 1 Fragility or Sin from your deck or discard.

name: Confirmation
text: During this and the next round, Gifts give +1 extra Fervor manually.

name: Eucharist
text: Recover one card used this round. If there was accompaniment, gain +1 Communion.

name: Reconciliation
text: Purify 1 Sin. Convert a failure into a Failure with Examen.

name: Anointing of the Sick
text: Convert up to 2 Desolation into Light this round.

name: Holy Orders
text: The next purchase from the Church Row costs 1 less.

name: Matrimony
text: In cooperative play, both players share +1 Fervor. In solo play, gain +2 Light manually.

name: World
text: If you do not play a Virtue this round, gain +1 Attachment.

name: Devil
text: The first Virtue played this round does not count unless you play Examen or Understanding.

name: Flesh
text: You may only play 2 cards unless you play Prayer, Fasting, or Temperance.

name: Father
text: Lower Attachment by 1 or cancel World. Order the next cards.

name: Son
text: Turn one consequence into offering. A purified Sin gives double Light this round.

name: Holy Spirit
text: Copy a Gift already played. Heal 1 Desolation.

name: Most Holy Trinity
text: If Communion is 7+, overcome the Final Choice.

name: Guardian Angel
text: When you draw a Sin, you may place it on top or bottom of your deck.

name: Saint Michael the Archangel
text: Against Devil, gain +2 Light and +1 Fervor manually.

name: Saint Raphael the Archangel
text: When you heal Desolation, gain +1 Fruit.

name: Saint Gabriel the Archangel
text: Look at another Trial and choose which one to face.

name: Saint Ignatius of Loyola
text: When you play Examen, gain +1 Fervor. If you reject a shortcut, gain +2 Light manually.

name: Saint Teresa of Jesus
text: If you have Desolation, Prayer gives +2 Light manually.

name: Saint Francis of Assisi
text: With Generosity, you may lose 1 Fruit to lower Attachment by 1.

name: Saint Joseph
text: Diligence and Silence count against Sloth.

name: Saint Monica
text: If you fail a Trial, keep one card for the next round.

name: Holy Catholic Church
text: You may refresh one card in the Church Row. Sacraments cost 1 less manually.

name: Communion of Saints
text: Use a Saint or Angel from your discard as +2 Light manually.

name: Mary, Mother of the Church
text: Once per game, convert Desolation into Consolation.

name: Prayer
text: If played before a Gift, add +1 Fervor manually.

name: Fasting
text: Cancel Flesh or Gluttony. You may play one fewer card to gain +1 Fervor.

name: Abstinence
text: Cancel Lust or Gluttony. Otherwise, prepare +2 Light for the next round.

name: Examen
text: Reveal a lie. If you fail, count it as Failure with Examen.

name: Word
text: Return a Virtue from your discard to your hand.

name: Almsgiving
text: Spend 1 Fruit to gain +1 Communion against Greed or Envy.

name: Silence
text: Cancel World or reduce Desolation by 1.

name: Watchfulness
text: Look at the next 2 Dark Banner cards.

name: Perseverance
text: If you failed the previous round, gain +3 Light and you may play one extra card.

name: You are corrected in front of others
text: Sin: Pride / Wrath. Darkness 8. Shortcut: Answer with irony: +5 Light, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: Someone receives the recognition you wanted
text: Sin: Envy. Darkness 7. Shortcut: Minimize it: draw 1 and gain +3 Light, add Envy. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You have extra money and someone needs help
text: Sin: Greed. Darkness 6. Shortcut: Keep it for security: +1 Fruit, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You are tired and it is time to pray
text: Sin: Sloth. Darkness 5. Shortcut: Leave it for tomorrow: +1 Desolation. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You receive a humiliation
text: Sin: Pride / Wrath. Darkness 9. Shortcut: Justify yourself aggressively: +5 Light, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: An image or memory disorders your desire
text: Sin: Lust. Darkness 8. Shortcut: Dwell on it: draw 2, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You eat, buy, or scroll too much to avoid emptiness
text: Sin: Gluttony. Darkness 7. Shortcut: Anesthetize yourself: heal 1 Desolation, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: Choose between looking good and telling the truth
text: Sin: World / Pride. Darkness 10. Shortcut: Look good: complete the Trial without Communion and add World. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You must ask for forgiveness first
text: Sin: Pride. Darkness 7. Shortcut: Wait for the other to yield: +4 Light, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: A small task feels heavy
text: Sin: Sloth. Darkness 5. Shortcut: Postpone it: draw 1, +1 Desolation. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You are provoked in conversation
text: Sin: Wrath. Darkness 8. Shortcut: Answer harshly: +5 Light, add Wrath. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You see someone fall and can judge them
text: Sin: Pride / Envy. Darkness 7. Shortcut: Feel superior: +3 Light, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You can serve without being seen
text: Sin: World / Sloth. Darkness 6. Shortcut: Avoid it because nobody will see: +1 Fruit, +1 Desolation. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: Noise prevents you from listening
text: Sin: World. Darkness 5. Shortcut: Distract yourself: draw 2, discard 1. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You must discern an important decision
text: Sin: Devil / Confusion. Darkness 11. Shortcut: Choose what is comfortable: +4 Light, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: An old wound is triggered
text: Sin: Wrath / Desolation. Darkness 9. Shortcut: Close yourself off: avoid consequence, +1 Desolation. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You can manipulate a small truth
text: Sin: Devil / Pride. Darkness 8. Shortcut: Useful half-truth: +5 Light, add Devil. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: The body asks for immediate comfort
text: Sin: Flesh / Gluttony. Darkness 6. Shortcut: Yield without measure: +3 Light, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You feel dryness in prayer
text: Sin: Desolation / Sloth. Darkness 7. Shortcut: Abandon it: draw 1, +1 Desolation. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You must rejoice for another person
text: Sin: Envy. Darkness 6. Shortcut: Congratulate externally, resent internally: +4 Light, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You are offered unjust gain
text: Sin: Greed / Devil. Darkness 10. Shortcut: Take advantage: +2 Fruits, +2 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: The community needs you
text: Sin: Sloth / World. Darkness 8. Shortcut: Hide: avoid spending cards, +1 Desolation. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: You compare yourself with your ideal life
text: Sin: World / Envy. Darkness 7. Shortcut: Fantasize and despise the present: draw 2, +1 Attachment. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.

name: Final Choice: under which banner will you live?
text: Sin: Final. Darkness 10. Shortcut: Add +2 Darkness for each Attachment above 5. Clean victory: +1 Communion, +3 Fruits.
